title: Solar Energy Installation Managers
description: Direct work crews installing residential or commercial solar photovoltaic or thermal systems.

tasks.text: Plan and coordinate installations of photovoltaic (PV) solar and solar thermal systems to ensure conformance to codes.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Supervise solar installers, technicians, and subcontractors for solar installation projects to ensure compliance with safety standards.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Estimate materials, equipment, and personnel needed for residential or commercial solar installation projects.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Prepare solar installation project proposals, quotes, budgets, or schedules.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Provide technical assistance to installers, technicians, or other solar professionals in areas such as solar electric systems, solar thermal systems, electrical systems, or mechanical systems.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Coordinate or schedule building inspections for solar installation projects.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Perform start-up of systems for testing or customer implementation.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Identify means to reduce costs, minimize risks, or increase efficiency of solar installation projects.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Assess system performance or functionality at the system, subsystem, and component levels.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Assess potential solar installation sites to determine feasibility and design requirements.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Monitor work of contractors and subcontractors to ensure projects conform to plans, specifications, schedules, or budgets.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Visit customer sites to determine solar system needs, requirements, or specifications.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Purchase or rent equipment for solar energy system installation.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Develop and maintain system architecture, including all piping, instrumentation, or process flow diagrams.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Evaluate subcontractors or subcontractor bids for quality, cost, and reliability.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.
